ast_golden.function_with_params: fn add(a: i64, b: i64) -> i64 { return (a + b); }
ast_golden.let_and_operations: fn compute() -> i64 { let x = 10;; let y = (x + 5);; let z = (y * 2);; return z; }
ast_golden.control_flow: fn sign(n: i64) -> i64 { if (n > 0) { return 1; } else { return 0; } }
ast_golden.loop_construct: fn countdown(n: i64) -> i64 { let mut i = n;; while (i > 0) { i = (i - 1); }; return i; }
ast_golden.struct_definition:
struct Point { x: i64, y: i64 }
fn origin() {  }
ast_golden.struct_literal:
struct Vec2 { x: i64, y: i64 }
pub fn make_vec(x: i64, y: i64) -> Vec2 { return Vec2 { x: x, y: y }; }
ast_golden.complex_expressions: fn evaluate(a: i64, b: i64) -> bool { let x = (a + (b * 2));; let y = (a == b);; let z = (!y || (x > 100));; return z; }
ast_golden.nested_calls:
fn outer() -> i64 { return inner(5); }
fn inner(n: i64) -> i64 { return (n * 2); }
ast_golden.mutual_recursion:
fn is_even(n: i64) -> bool { return (n == 0); }
fn is_odd(n: i64) -> bool { return !is_even(n); }
